function.name: create_plan
function.description: Create a step-by-step plan for a complex goal. Use when the user asks to plan something, organize tasks, or needs a structured approach to a problem. Examples: travel planning, project planning, report writing.

goal.description: The goal to create a plan for. Example: 'Du lịch Nhật 7 ngày', 'Viết báo cáo doanh thu Q1'

function.name: run_autonomous
function.description: Learning-demo only: heuristic autonomous loop. Prefer calling concrete tools yourself (calculator, weather, search, etc.) via the main function-calling loop. Use run_autonomous only if the user explicitly asks for the autonomous learning demo.

goal.description: The goal for the autonomous agent. Example: 'Tính thuế VAT của 7 triệu'

function.name: run_multi_agent
function.description: Run a multi-agent collaboration with specialized agents (Research, Coder, Reviewer, Writer) working together on a task. Best for complex questions requiring research, analysis, and synthesis.

task.description: The task for the multi-agent team. Example: 'Giải thích BM25 algorithm'

function.name: run_workflow
function.description: Run a predefined multi-step workflow pipeline. Available workflows: 'bao-cao-doanh-thu' (revenue report). Use when user explicitly asks to run a workflow.

workflow_name.description: Name of the workflow to run. Example: 'bao-cao-doanh-thu'
